Module 3:
Quick Launch, Part 1
Executive Summary
The Quick Launch is a great way to bring in money fast. The caveat is that
you need some type of product, offer, and list.
If you are just starting out you would want to go with the Seed Launch, as
that’s a great way to move people from prospect list to buyer list
First, you need a story and a special offer.
• 	For the Offer:
• 	Use a discount, bonus, webinar, teleseminar - doesn’t need to be
fancy
• 	Example: 50% off your product with an upsell on the backend - you
can also bundle items together
• 	For the Story:
• 	Your story doesn’t have to be amazing or complicated - it can be
about anything really, as long as there’s a story
• 	Example: I remember when a tax bill came in and it had an extra
(unexpected) digit, so I performed a promotional sale in order to pay
for this bill - from there the Quick Launch was born
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

• 	Example: Use it as an opportunity to show customer/reader
appreciation
You do need a start and end to the launch just like a normal one. Generally,
a quick launch is done completely through email.
You won’t do $1 million through a Quick Launch but the key is you move
people into your buyer list. This is important because a buyer is instantly
15-20X more valuable to your business.
All it requires is a special offer, a story, and a definitive start/end. You don’t
want to always have your products on sale though, this causes poor
positioning.
Here’s an example: I remember visiting a furniture store multiple times, and
every time all the furniture in the store was on sale. If people begin to
expect discounts from you they’ll just wait for a sale.
You want to make sure you have a story and reason for why you’re offering
the discount.
Quick Launches are simple, easy, fun, lucrative, and beneficial to your
business. Next we’ll be talking about some examples of Quick Launches.
!
When to Use a Quick Launch
You want to bring in money fast
You already have an offer, a product, and list
!

-- 2 of 3 --

You want to move more people into your buyer list because buyers are
15-20X more valuable to your business
You want to show appreciation to your customers, readers, fans
!
